ddls:
CREATE TABLE "garment_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment category (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., bust, length, waist, height) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, feet) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size range */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size range (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size range */,
  "size_order" INTEGER /* Order of the size range (for sorting purposes) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size range was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size range was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment category */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size range */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the measurement */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES garment_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garments" (
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the garment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the garment */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the garment image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the garment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the garment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES garment_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size range */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of garments in stock */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Low stock threshold for notifications */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size range */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the garment in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., sales, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_user" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "user_id")
)
